plugins.name: ralphharness
plugins.description: Spec-driven development with bidirectional chat protocol between executor and reviewer. Research, requirements, design, tasks, autonomous execution, and epic triage. Fresh context per task.

plugins.name: ralphharness-speckit
plugins.description: Spec-driven development using GitHub spec-kit methodology. Constitution-first approach with specify, plan, tasks, and implement phases.

plugins.name: ralphharness-bmad-bridge
plugins.description: Bridge plugin connecting RalphHarness spec-driven development with BMAD workflow tools and review agents.
